description: In the image, a person is sitting at a desk in a dark room. The person is wearing a yellow shirt and is holding a computer mouse with their right hand. On the desk, there are two computer monitors and a phone. The room has a window that is covered by curtains and through which light is shining into the room. Outside the window, you can see trees. The overall atmosphere of the image is quiet and focused, perhaps suggesting that the person is working or studying.
